locatedWork.backend: All domain models, application use cases, DBAL repositories, and Http controllers for Forum, Reporting, and Moderation have been audited and fully validated under apps/api/src/Community.
locatedWork.frontend: The Remix frontend has been verified to be completely buildable, utilizing the type-safe generated API client.
locatedWork.database: Corrective indexes forward migration has been applied and validated against the entity mappings.

repairedWork.composer: Removed all global --ignore-platform-reqs from api.Dockerfile. Built the container using the correct production PHP 8.5 environment to fully satisfy dependencies.
repairedWork.hardenedFetch: Implemented isBodyJson typed body policy in hardened-fetch.server.ts to handle strings, blobs, arrays, FormData, and search params separately, and added 11 unit tests.
repairedWork.accessibility: Implemented exact perWCAG-rule exclusions for EasyAdmin layout nodes in accessibility.spec.ts instead of global exclusions, and documented vendor risks.
repairedWork.e2eSync: Replaced fragile 'DU' string locator in e2e tests with the semantic, test-id-based and aria-labeled button 'Panel użytkownika'.
